name: Operant AI
description: Operant AI is a cloud-native security startup that provides a Runtime Application Protection platform, actively shielding live applications across APIs, AI integrations, and Kubernetes environments from real-time cyber threats. Their platform delivers instant live blueprints of every application layer and blocks over 80% of OWASP Top 10 attacks without any code instrumentation.
key_differentiator: Unlike static analysis tools, Operant AI provides agentless, real-time runtime protection across APIs, LLMs, and Kubernetes that blocks the majority of OWASP Top 10 and AI-specific attacks without any code changes or instrumentation.

name: Upbound
description: Upbound is a cloud-native computing company and the creator of the open-source project Crossplane, providing intelligent control planes based on Kubernetes that enable enterprises to provision, operate, and manage multi-cloud environments as one unified platform.
key_differentiator: Upbound created and maintains Crossplane, the leading open-source framework for building cloud-native control planes, giving it a unique community-driven advantage over incumbents in multi-cloud infrastructure management.

name: Ori Global Cloud
description: Ori Global Cloud (also known as Ori Industries) is a full-stack AI cloud infrastructure platform that provides on-demand GPU compute combined with a flexible software layer to help teams train, serve, and scale AI models. It enables orchestration of enterprise applications across public, private, and edge clouds.
key_differentiator: Ori differentiates by combining powerful GPU compute with a flexible software orchestration layer that seamlessly manages workloads across public, private, and edge cloud environments — enabling end-to-end AI infrastructure in a single platform.

name: Union.ai
description: Union.ai is an AI development infrastructure platform that enables engineering teams to orchestrate, train, and serve scalable AI, ML, and agentic systems. Built on Flyte, the open-source AI orchestrator, it offers an end-to-end platform covering orchestration, model training, inference, and observability.
key_differentiator: Union.ai leads the emerging category of "AI development infrastructure" by providing a unified platform built on the open-source Flyte standard, enabling teams to move from AI experiment to production with crash-resilient, dynamic workflows — unlike legacy DevOps or MLOps tools that struggle with AI-specific workloads.

name: Cylake
description: Cylake is an AI-native, data-driven cybersecurity platform built for the world's largest and most regulated institutions (banks, governments, defense, healthcare), operating fully on-premises or in private cloud environments—no public cloud required. The platform consolidates visibility and control across the entire infrastructure stack using agentic security workflows on a sovereign data foundation.
key_differentiator: Unlike cloud-dependent SIEM/XDR platforms, Cylake processes all security data entirely on-premises or in private clouds, enabling regulated organizations to achieve advanced AI-native security without sacrificing data sovereignty.

name: Sensera Systems
description: Sensera Systems provides AI-powered jobsite intelligence solutions for the construction industry, offering self-contained, solar-powered, wirelessly connected camera hardware and cloud software (SiteCloud) that deliver real-time visibility, safety, and project management capabilities.
key_differentiator: Sensera Systems differentiates through self-contained, solar-powered, and wirelessly connected hardware tightly integrated with AI-driven cloud software (SiteCloud), enabling easy no-infrastructure deployment on any jobsite for real-time safety, security, and project visibility.

name: Pulumi
description: Pulumi is an infrastructure-as-code platform that enables engineers to write, deploy, and manage cloud infrastructure using general-purpose programming languages they already know. It supports any cloud and offers AI-powered tooling to boost developer productivity and infrastructure automation.
key_differentiator: Unlike traditional IaC tools (e.g., Terraform) that use domain-specific languages, Pulumi lets developers write infrastructure code in familiar general-purpose languages (Python, TypeScript, Go, etc.) across any cloud provider.

name: Tackle.io
description: Tackle.io is a Cloud go-to-market (GTM) platform that helps software companies generate revenue by enabling them to identify buyers, co-sell with cloud providers, and transact through cloud marketplaces like AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.
key_differentiator: Tackle is the only dedicated Cloud GTM platform combining a data-driven co-sell and marketplace transact solution across all three major clouds (AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft), backed by deep expertise serving 550+ software companies.
